title: Sildenafil for Microvasculopathy in Chronic TBI

skipped_criteria: Provision of signed and dated informed consent form (administrative/procedural requirement, no schema field).
Stated willingness to comply with all study procedures (administrative/procedural requirement, no schema field).
Defense Enrollment Eligibility Reporting System (DEERS) eligibility at WRNMMC (site-specific administrative criterion, no schema field).
History of TBI greater than 6 months and less than 25 years prior to enrollment per 2023 ACRM criteria (requires temporal history and diagnostic criteria detail not in schema).
Chronic persistent post-concussive symptoms with Rivermead Post-Concussion Symptom Questionnaire score >1 on at least 3 items (requires symptom questionnaire score not in schema).
Glasgow Outcome Scale-Extended (GOSE) between 5-7 (GOSE is not a schema field; distinct from GCS).
Ability to take oral medication and adhere to study intervention regimen (functional/compliance criterion, no schema field).
Ability to participate in and complete MRI including CVR challenges and 4-week treatment period (procedural/functional criterion, no schema field).
Adequate hearing and vision based on self-report and examiner's observation (sensory assessment criterion, no schema field).
Current/ongoing use of organic nitrate vasodilators or riociguat within past month (medication history, no schema field).
Current/ongoing use of ritonavir within past month (medication history, no schema field).
Current/ongoing use of erythromycin, ketoconazole, or itraconazole within past month (medication history, no schema field).
Current/ongoing use of cimetidine within past month (medication history, no schema field).
Current resting hypotension BP < 90/50 mmHg: diastolic component (DBP < 50) cannot be expressed as schema only has sbp_mmhg; SBP < 90 encoded.
Current severe renal insufficiency (lab/clinical diagnosis, no schema field).
Current hepatic cirrhosis (medical history/diagnosis, no schema field).
Current cardiac failure or coronary artery disease causing unstable angina (medical history/diagnosis, no schema field).
Retinitis pigmentosa (medical history/diagnosis, no schema field).
Known hypersensitivity or allergy to sildenafil or its components (allergy history, no schema field).
History of melanoma or suspicious skin lesions for melanoma (medical history/diagnosis, no schema field).
Daily therapy with a PDE5 inhibitor within the month prior to consent (medication history, no schema field).
History of penetrating TBI (specific TBI subtype history, no schema field).
History of disabling neurological or psychiatric disorder not related to TBI (medical history/diagnosis, no schema field).
Active substance abuse or dependence during the past 6 months (substance use history, no schema field).
Estimated preinjury intellectual level ≤70 based on educational and vocational history (cognitive/intellectual assessment, no schema field).
Inability to understand written and spoken English in the opinion of the investigator (language/cognitive criterion, no schema field).
Current inclusion in another interventional trial (enrollment status, no schema field).
Metal implants that would interfere with MR imaging procedures (implant history, no schema field).
History of priapism (medical history, no schema field).
Breastfeeding women (lactation status, no schema field).
Actively suicidal based on clinician assessment or PHQ-9/CSSRS scores (psychiatric assessment/questionnaire scores, no schema field).
Hypertension requiring treatment with more than two antihypertensive drugs (medication count/treatment history, no schema field).
Hyperlipidemia requiring treatment with more than one lipid lowering drug (medication count/treatment history, no schema field).
Diabetes mellitus requiring medical treatment with insulin (medical history/treatment, no schema field).
